Body: {

  "result": {
    "capabilities": {
      "completionProvider": {
        "resolveProvider": false,
        "triggerCharacters": [
          "%"

      "definitionProvider": true,
      "documentSymbolProvider": true,
      "referencesProvider": true,
      "hoverProvider": true,
      "implementationProvider": true,
      "renameProvider": true,
      "workspaceSymbolProvider": true,
      "textDocumentSync": 1
    }

}
